prompt_used: Story: Signal From Kharon-9 (signal-from-kharon-9) | Hook: Telemetry returns from a decommissioned orbital array and predicts player replies. | Subgenre: cosmic horror | Tone: INTENSE | Location: Mountain observatory and subterranean receiver array | Villain: The Quiet Orbit | Villain worldview: Human choices are measurable noise in a larger equation. | Motifs: black stars, phase drift, echoing pings. Build unique voice profile for Systems Engineer Ari Vance. Baseline emotion=CALM. Motivations=Control fallout quickly.. Include cadence notes and emotional shifts for suspicion, trust, and panic states.
